resources.string: Cardamum is paid by the people who use it
No company, no ads, no subscription: one person builds and maintains Cardamum, and it exists only as long as its users fund it. If Cardamum is useful to you, this is where it counts.
Pay once, whatever feels right. This screen never shows again.
Removes this screen for good, and funds Cardamum\'s development, maintenance and releases.
Everything above, plus your name among the backers, in the app and in the Cardamum repository (pseudonym or anonymous welcome).
Everything above, plus beta access on Google Play; a share of this tier is given to NLnet.
Everything above, plus your name on pimalaya.org and in the Pimalaya organization, and your Cardamum issues looked at first.
Everything above, plus first-class attention across all Pimalaya repositories, and the option of a 15-minute thank-you call.
The support tiers are unavailable right now
